codes.meaning: Source-backed row is complete enough for lookup/enrichment.
Source-backed row is usable but missing non-critical fields.
Sketch or symbol linkage exists but dimensions must not be fabricated.
Multiple source rows conflict and require declared precedence.
Dimension data exists but weight is unavailable.
Weight/source data exists but required dimensions are unavailable.
Project/user override has supplied one or more fields.
Retained for compatibility but not preferred for new lookup.
Original application config or UI catalog source, not dimensional data.
File/source is inventoried but not parsed into engineering rows yet.
